description: Validates that the compiler issues warnings when user-defined symbols shadow system symbols.

diagnostics.messageContains: Elements with 'p-for' directives should have a unique 'p-key' binding for efficient updates
User-defined function 'T' shadows a built-in Piko system symbol
Loop variable 'request' shadows a built-in Piko system symbol

assertNodes.description: The call to T() should resolve to the LOCAL function, not the built-in.
The 'request' symbol inside the loop should resolve to the loop variable, not the system one.
